faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Government Medical College, Ratlam is up to 183. Good thing to know is that Government Medical College, Ratlam has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like NMC.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Government Medical College, Ratlam for all courses combined?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the academics and hostels.

review_content.Placements: In our college per year, 180 students got admission to our college for the MBBS course. Students who passed four and a half years of MBBS will be eligible for an internship and get a 13,400 stipend. Interns have to do duty in government hospitals, and they are paid by the government.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our hostel and college is very good. There are sufficient classrooms to accommodate 180 students. Library facilities are also provided by the college, where we can read different books and also issue books for 10 days. The food quality in the mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Home away from home which you'll always cherish .

review_content.Placements: We do not have any placements in MBBS but rather, it's internship which starts after the final program of MBBS ends and continues for a year It is a compulsory step for all students and will teach you the real-life aspects of your course My internship will start from the Next year .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with all the technical facilities. The library is huge, remains open all day and night, and has all the books you need. The hostel is also good, with food available in the mess, which is average. There is a gym and an indoor sports room on our campus, as well as grounds for other outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Virtual tour of the college.

content.Placements: About 180 students are there in every batch. The internship is stipend around 13,000. When we clarify the need for a PG exam, we are able to get admission in PG post-graduation in various colleges all over the world. All over India, the top roles we got were like saving a person.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good and enough and the infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available in the library and respective labs are there regarding to their respective departments, like pathology and physiology. In physiology, we have hematology lab and a clinical lab and classrooms are very well mannered and library is like the very standard quality of the facilities I got in the hostel. A little bit of medium in rating the quality of the food is to average. There are about 223 canteens and all medical facilities, as it is also a medical college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Medical College, Ratlam.

content.Placements: The batch comprises of 180 students and course if of 4.5 years and 1 year of mandatory internship. Each year has different subjects, like in 2nd year there is pharmacology microbiology and pathology. All the departments have professors and PGs too. PGs help in facilitating the course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very nice and built in 2018. There is a library, hostel, sports ground, academic blocks and hospital too in the campus. The library have wifi facilities with AC. There are also cycle and scooter stands for bikes and proper water supply throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Ratlam.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice and built in 2018. There is a library, hostel, sports ground, academic blocks and hospital too in the campus. The library have wifi facilities with AC. There are also cycle and scooter stands for bikes and proper water supply throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the academics and hostels.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our hostel and college is very good. There are sufficient classrooms to accommodate 180 students. Library facilities are also provided by the college, where we can read different books and also issue books for 10 days. The food quality in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Home away from home which you'll always cherish .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with all the technical facilities. The library is huge, remains open all day and night, and has all the books you need. The hostel is also good, with food available in the mess, which is average. There is a gym and an indoor sports room on our campus, as well as grounds for other outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members, but the environment is quite conservative.
reviews.review_text: As it is a government college established in 2018, its infrastructure is top-notch: AC and projectors are available in each lecture hall; a library and sports field for basketball and badminton are also available; and a mess and canteen are present in each hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The girls' hostel is very good; we have single rooms provided in this college only, so it is very good for us. Our college is very good as it is a new college, so the building is fresh. We have a library, smart classrooms, a mess canteen, and all types of sports facilities, including a gym.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are very modern. Hostel facilities are good. Seniors are kind and helpful. Sports such as basketball, football, cricket, badminton, and table tennis are conducted.

faqs.answer: A:    Mahatma Jyotiba Fule College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences has courses such as BVSC which are primarily in the stream of Science. Mahatma Jyotiba Fule College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences has specializations such as BVSC specializations in Veterinary Science.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Mahatma Jyotiba Fule College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences?

faqs.answer: A:    Mahatma Jyotiba Fule College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences offers a UG Degree course in Science. The course is available in Full Time mode. Seats intake availability for these courses at Mahatma Jyotiba Fule College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences goes up to 80.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Mahatma Jyotiba Fule College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences?

review_content.Placements: Mostly around 80% of the students get placed in our college. Packages are not offered in this course. Companies do not visit the college to recruit students from our course, but students can join various companies after the course. Most of the students who pass the 4th year will get internships. The role offered to students is a veterinary doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are completely connected with Wi-Fi. Labs are acceptable but not up to expectations. The library is well-equipped with journals and reference books. Facilities of the hostel include AC, cupboards, beds with attached bathrooms, and ventilation. The quality of the food in the mess should be improved, and South Indian food should be allowed. Sports are well-encouraged on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure of the college is developing. Good quality eduction is provided with practicals.

review_content.Placements: Admission in the college depends upon students' NEET exam in which they should score 50% of marks. The highest salary offered is 1,25,000 lacs per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month. Recruitment is mainly done in veterinary hospitality and veterinary colleges. The role offered will be to help for endemic species, wounded animals and provide medicine for free. The highest salary package offered in our course is 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 5LPA. An average salary package offered in our course is 7.5 LPA. Students who score 5.5 in their GPA will get an internship.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college. I would recommend that you not get any B.VSA&AH courses.

review_content.Placements: As a final-year student, I have had a good experience with the placement and career support offered by the college. The placement cell is active throughout the year and regularly updates us about job openings, internships, and government recruitment notifications. They also arrange career guidance sessions, soft-skill training, and mock interviews, which help us feel more confident. Many students from our senior batches were selected for positions in government veterinary services, livestock development boards, dairy industries, poultry farms, and pharmaceutical companies. Some students also secured placements in private veterinary hospitals, NGOs, and research laboratories.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Rajmata Jijau Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Pharmacy:

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good campus with smart and experienced faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The salary package offered ranges from 3.6 LPA to 5 LPA. Companies like Alfa Laval, Bilcare, Emcure, Biopharma, etc., visit here for recruitment. About 15% of students got internships in companies like Emcure, Biopharma, and others. Top roles offered are of marketing head, in charge of pharmacovigilance department, data analysts, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: A Wi-Fi facility is available for free but only on the ground floor. The hostel facility is only for girls and is in the college premises. The fee is Rs. 2500 per month. Boys have to rent rooms that are at a walkable distance of the college. Our college has a huge playground with separate basketball and volleyball courts. There is a canteen on the college premises, and also various mess agencies are at a walkable distance from hostels. The library is on the first floor of the college building. Separate laboratories are available for different departments. Classrooms are huge, well-lit, and well-ventilated with windows and fans. They are equipped with smart boards and projectors.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with faculty.

Top recruiters include Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd., Pharmaceuticals and healthcare, Cipla Ltd., Torrent Pharmaceuticals Ltd., Mankind Pharma Ltd., Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Ltd., and Lupin Ltd., all headquartered in India.
review_content.Infrastructure: The College of Pharmacy typically offers a variety of facilities and infrastructure to support its academic and research goals. These include well-equipped classrooms, specialized laboratories, library, computer facilities and often a pilot plant for practical training and research.

faqs.answer: Rajmata Jijau Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. review_summary.college_name: Rajmata Jijau Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is supportive and has good placements.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed ranges from 85-90%. The highest package is offered for M. Pharmacy. The average package is offered for B. Pharmacy. The lowest package is offered for D. Pharma. 21.5% of students got internships. Top offers after a B. Pharma (Bachelor of Pharmacy) degree typically include roles in pharmaceutical companies, hospitals, and research institutions.
content.Infrastructure: It provides facilities like E-learning, a library, a study room, a sick room, labs, Wi-Fi, AC, etc. The hostel has separate washrooms. The quality of the food is good. Hostels are often raised to provide a comfortable and supportive living environment. The canteens are valuable for offering nutritious and affordable food options.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good campus with smart and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: The salary package offered ranges from 3.6 LPA to 5 LPA. Companies like Alfa Laval, Bilcare, Emcure, Biopharma, etc., visit here for recruitment. About 15% of students got internships in companies like Emcure, Biopharma, and others. Top roles offered are of marketing head, in charge of pharmacovigilance department, data analysts, etc.
content.Infrastructure: A Wi-Fi facility is available for free but only on the ground floor. The hostel facility is only for girls and is in the college premises. The fee is Rs. 2500 per month. Boys have to rent rooms that are at a walkable distance of the college. Our college has a huge playground with separate basketball and volleyball courts. There is a canteen on the college premises, and also various mess agencies are at a walkable distance from hostels. The library is on the first floor of the college building. Separate laboratories are available for different departments. Classrooms are huge, well-lit, and well-ventilated with windows and fans. They are equipped with smart boards and projectors.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with faculty.

content.Placements: 45 percent students get placed in the course. The highest salary package offered to B. Pharmacy graduates typically ranges from 8 LPA while the lowest is around 3 LPA. Top recruiters include Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd., Pharmaceuticals and healthcare, Cipla Ltd., Torrent Pharmaceuticals Ltd., Mankind Pharma Ltd., Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Ltd., and Lupin Ltd., all headquartered in India.
content.Infrastructure: The College of Pharmacy typically offers a variety of facilities and infrastructure to support its academic and research goals. These include well-equipped classrooms, specialized laboratories, library, computer facilities and often a pilot plant for practical training and research.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Very good facilitation of college.

content.Placements: I like the facility and I feel I had the best environment for my study I learn many new things from my teachers who where many helpful in every way they think the teacher students instruction is very good the teachers were very great the teachers very friendly.
content.Infrastructure: In the contests of teaching and education infrastructure refer to the physical organisation structure that supports the teaching and learning process this includes building classroom buildings, libraries, libraries internet connectivity, and other facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My college story, short and sweet .

review_content.Placements: Every student that passed the fourth year gets to do an internship at the same hospital as our college internship. The salary is 9-10k, and as a medical officer, we get 80-90k, and a senior doctor gets almost 2 lacs. The top role is to treat patients in OPD surgeries.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is good, but the infrastructure is pretty old because the establishment year was 2003, and the buildings are old rooms that need to be renovated. Practical labs are available for every subject; there are 19 subjects in MBBS, and there is proper equipment present.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: On average, 200 students per year get admission to our college. Packages will range based on recruitment, such as professors, assistant professors, medical officers, etc. All 200 students got internships at our college itself. Only students of this college are able to get internships at our college .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Major lecture halls can accommodate 200 students, but in hospitals, they need to make groups of 50 students so that there is no rush in the hospital due to students. Hostels are well maintained, having 2 mess rooms that provide lunch, dinner and breakfast.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Akola Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is very nice.

content.Placements: GMC Akola had 200 seats for the MBBS course. They offer a very good placement. The placement percentage is very high in our college. The selection ratio for PGs from our college is also very high. In the year 2024, our college had an all-India rank of 14.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of GMC Akola is very huge. It had a very good infrastructure and included well-built buildings like an academic building, library, volleyball ground, basketball court, cricket ground, a huge auditorium hall, admin hall, and widely spread hospital building.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Here, two big central libraries are available, which have the capacity for all students to study.

content.Placements: 200 students, 18.5k during internship. Rank two-digit came from Akola last year NEET-PG. 100 percent service to poor and needy people. Government Medical College Akola has a good amount of patient flow and also has a large number of beds available for patients.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is allotted from the first year onwards. 2 big central libraries. We have a big admin hall. The canteen is available, and food quality is good. Basketball and cricket grounds are available. Teams are made, and inter-region competition takes place here. The winning team is awarded.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college story, short and sweet .

content.Placements: Every student that passed the fourth year gets to do an internship at the same hospital as our college internship. The salary is 9-10k, and as a medical officer, we get 80-90k, and a senior doctor gets almost 2 lacs. The top role is to treat patients in OPD surgeries.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is good, but the infrastructure is pretty old because the establishment year was 2003, and the buildings are old rooms that need to be renovated. Practical labs are available for every subject; there are 19 subjects in MBBS, and there is proper equipment present.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: On average, 200 students per year get admission to our college. Packages will range based on recruitment, such as professors, assistant professors, medical officers, etc. All 200 students got internships at our college itself. Only students of this college are able to get internships at our college .
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Major lecture halls can accommodate 200 students, but in hospitals, they need to make groups of 50 students so that there is no rush in the hospital due to students. Hostels are well maintained, having 2 mess rooms that provide lunch, dinner and breakfast.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Interns in Maharashtra earned between INR 10000 per month and INR 11,000 per month. After MBBS you could do medical officer ship, which pays INR. 70,000 per month in Maharashtra. You could also do PG if you got a good rank in NEET PG. You will get a decent amount of money.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good hostel infrastructure. In your first year, you are assigned to another hostel that was close to the dean's office and lecture hall. One room had three to four students sharing a double bunk bed. It has a guard too. We lived in a different hostel from our second to our final year, which was better than the junior hostel.

description: Government Medical College, Akola cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Akola NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 19411 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Akola MBBS cutoff 2025 was 19411 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 19858 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College, Akola NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 157778. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College, Akola MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MD in Anatomy. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 157778.

reviews.review_heading: Gmc Akola. One of best gmc for you.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi not available. Classroom is okay. Library is good. Hostel are normal. Mess is not available. Medical facilities is good. Sport facilities are okay. Overall. Good quality after considering government medical college. And all the facilities are government. Facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The biggest Government Medical College in Western Vidarbha.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is quite decent. No Wi-Fi facility from the government is available. Mess facility is also average. Canteen issues present. The library is quite big and all facilities and all books are available for studies. The classrooms are nice. The campus is okay compared to other big colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Akola.
reviews.review_text: There are separate hostels for undergraduates and postgraduates. PGs have a room with an attached washroom. Water supply and electric supply are available 24x7. As it is a medical college, you can expect cleanliness and immediate medical management is provided. There is a well-equipped library, mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Inside information of Gmc Akola.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is not that good it's a very small campus barely have any ground to play sports and there is no such encouragement for extra curricular activities in terms of hostel for the first years it is compact for girls it is on the sharing of four people and for the boys hostel is pretty dirty but from second year onwards you get a twin sharing based hostel room comprising of two tables two chair two beds and an almirah which is very well spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a very good college to be in.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not 100% perfect, but yeah, it's decently good. We have all the facilities for OPD patients and emergent patients; we have hostels for PG students; and we also have practical classes with well-equipped instruments for us to practice.

reviews.review_heading: The college was good in terms of faculty but poor in terms of facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure of this college were not so good because it is old and the library also doesn't have all the books. The quality of the food is moderate.

reviews_list.review_title: RVM Medical College Telangana is good.

review_content.Placements: There is no package system in MBBS. There are other courses too. But go for MBBS. Nursing is okay. But MBBS will be very useful.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food quality is not good. Room is small, tho. 1st there was no lift, but this year a lift was built.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty is very cooperative. Exam is very difficult. The food quality is not good. Room is small, tho. 1st there was no lift, but this year a lift was built. The food quality is not good. Room is small, tho. 1st there was no lift, but this year a lift was built.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because the faculty and the patient flow in the college .

review_content.Placements: 250 members are present in our batch of year 2023 and our college have many patients by which we can SEE all the patients and improve our skills ant gain knowledge more about diseases internship is mandatory in MBBS which is provided by college itself .
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is present behind the college so their is no problem in going to college and the rooms are good and the only problem is water problem in the summer other than this their s no problem in college and hostel labs are good library is also present hear where we can study .

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, I can say that this college is best to study with a combined hospital.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students get placed. The highest package is above 3 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 50,000 per month. Top colleges such as Osmania, Gandhi, Apollo, Kamineni, Apollo, and other top private colleges hire students from the college. 99% of students got internships with a maximum stipend in our college. Roles like MD anesthesiologist, radiologist, general surgeon, and some roles related to medical research are offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure with central AC and good quality internet, and well-equipped labs. It also has a central library with an extensive collection of books, journals, and seminar rooms for workshops and presentations. There are clean, neat, and well-spaced rooms in the hostel. We get hygienic and nutritious food with veg and non-veg options and affordable pricing in the canteen. Basic healthcare facilities are available 24x7 and president doctors are often available for emergency purposes with ambulance service. Outdoor and indoor sports are along with inter-college competitions.

Top colleges such as Osmania, Gandhi, Apollo, Kamineni, Apollo, and other top private colleges hire students from the college. 99% of students got internships with a maximum stipend in our college. Roles like MD anesthesiologist, radiologist, general surgeon, and some roles related to medical research are offered here.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure with central AC and good quality internet, and well-equipped labs. It also has a central library with an extensive collection of books, journals, and seminar rooms for workshops and presentations. There are clean, neat, and well-spaced rooms in the hostel. We get hygienic and nutritious food with veg and non-veg options and affordable pricing in the canteen. Basic healthcare facilities are available 24x7 and president doctors are often available for emergency purposes with ambulance service. Outdoor and indoor sports are along with inter-college competitions.

table.details: AICTE, the Government of India Ministry of HRD, the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI)

placements.overview:
Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy is approved by AICTE, the Government of India Ministry of HRD, and the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI). Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy is affiliated with the Pt.B.D.Sharma University of Health Science and the Haryana Board of Technical Education. The college is run by the Baljeet Singh Educational Society and through three departments, offers UG and diploma courses to students across the Pharmacy stream. The major highlights of Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy are tabulated below:

Q. Which courses are offered by Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy?

Q. How are the placements at Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good and bad things about this college .

review_content.Placements: Their are not many companies that visit our college for placement nor does our college promote it. It's just that students have to go through it offline. Their are some auditorium presentations of our course. Some students get places, but not much. They don't really tell us about the placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are not well maintained. Experiments are done regularly. Their is a proper outfit that we have to wear on the day of practical. New material for labs is not brought by the college higher-ups; they charge a lot for all these labs and libraries, but it is not worth paying.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Delhi NCR.

review_content.Placements: Around 100% of placements are provided in our college. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA and the average salary package is 6 LPA. The recruiting company is Cipla. Around 70-75% of students get internships in our college. The roles offered are HR and manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi and a spacious library are provided. Hostel has big and clean rooms. There are great playgrounds with good equipment. The quality of the food is good, and a variety of food items are provided, but the quantity is not limited.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students get placed in our college. It holds a high placement rate but on-campus placements are very low. Around 20% of students get jobs after the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels, classrooms, labs, and the library are well-equipped. There are hostels for both boys and girls. Our campus is fully enabled with Wi-Fi. Labs are well-equipped with the latest equipment and apparatus, which makes practicals enjoyable.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are very good, knowledgeable, and helpful. Many of them have done Ph.D. They solve the doubts of the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: In education, this college is better.

review_content.Placements: About 30% of students get placement from gurugram global college of pharmacy. The highest package is INR 10 to 12 Lacs and average is INR 6 Lacs and the lowest package is INR 3 to 4 Lacs. There were only few companies that visited. Therefore, there is no top company. There is no internship for my course. The top role of my course is of a pharmacist .
review_content.Infrastructure: WIFI is available but does not work properly. Mostly WIFI was off. Class room is better than the labs. Library is good. But if we lost the book then they take too much fine. Hostel is great. But the water was salty. In the mess, food quality is low. Sports is in a very poor condition. There is no equipments in the hostel for playing sports .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Gurugram global college of pharmacy - review.

review_content.Placements: Very less amount of students get placement in this college. The average package is around 2 to 3 Lacs per annum, and the highest package is around 9 to 10 Lacs. Students do not get internship. General pharmacist is the top role offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided are good. Wi-Fi facility is not provided. Labs are available. Classrooms are average. Library is available, with a wide range of books. Mess food is of very low quality. Canteen is average, but the price is so high. Sports and games are very rare in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides a few placement opportunities. Around 5 to 10 companies visit our campus. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. Only 5% to 10% of students get internships. Top role offered is a pharmacist.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs are not available, but classrooms are good. The library is good. The hostel facilities are average. The mess and canteen are good. There are no facilities for sports or games. Medical services are extremely limited.

placement_data.title: Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy Placement Overview
paragraphs: Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy has completed its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2023. As per the latest report, the institute recorded 95% placement rate in the academic year 2022-2023. The highest and average package offered during Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy placements 2023 stood at INR 22 LPA and INR 6.2 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of Gurugram Global College of Pharmacy in 2023 included Ranbaxy, Abbott, Advik, Lupin Pharmaceuticals, JK Papers, Unichem Laboratories, Aurobindo, etc.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

review_content.Placements: Every year, more than 100 students join our college. Excellent placements are provided in the army camp, BFHUS University, and many more. Top 10 students get direct entry into army camps as doctor's while the next 20 top students are given the privilege to serve the university and different institutions and hospitals joined with them.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 on the campus including hostels. Classrooms and library are fully air-conditioned and have the latest technology of teaching. Professors are very supportive and understanding. Being near to highway we have an emergency multi-specialist hospital running 24X7.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: This is a good dental college as far as education is concerned .

review_content.Placements: There is as such no placement option given to students from college campus . You yourself to struggle . In most of dental college is as such provision of placement . Aur if by an chance they themselves keep you in their own college pay is too less to be taken.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infra is good , well managed , latest in their region but not best ,if you check all dental college near by its condition is well maintained but again not the best but better option in comparision to others that what I would like to say . Proper dental chairs ,xrays ,labs etcc

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members are good and make students good for practical work.

review_content.Placements: All students did well in their internship, and it makes them quite well in clinical works. Placements totally depend on our own interest. Our college helps us to manage with theory as well as practical part. Some students are also given placement in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lecture theatres are fully air-conditioned, and the library has quite good books. Practical labs are well-furnished. Hostels are provided with Wi-Fi, and basketball and badminton courts are well-managed. Every year our college organises annual function and sports meet.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Sukhmani Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: One of the best college in the region with the lowest fee structure and best infrastructure.

content.Placements: Various healthcare companies visit college campus for job recruitment, after completion of the course you become eligible for opening your own clinic that you don't have to depend on anyone for recruitment. Various Pharmacovigilance companies also carries out placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: Fully Wi-Fi campus, Digital lecture theatre, One central Library along with it each department have their own departmental library, One general Hospital, one canteen, basketball court, playgrounds, seperate hostels for boys and girls, safe for girls as warden take care of them personally.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with placements, infrastructure, faculty members, and peace on the campus.

content.Placements: Every year, more than 100 students join our college. Excellent placements are provided in the army camp, BFHUS University, and many more. Top 10 students get direct entry into army camps as doctor's while the next 20 top students are given the privilege to serve the university and different institutions and hospitals joined with them.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 on the campus including hostels. Classrooms and library are fully air-conditioned and have the latest technology of teaching. Professors are very supportive and understanding. Being near to highway we have an emergency multi-specialist hospital running 24X7.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This is a good dental college as far as education is concerned .

content.Placements: There is as such no placement option given to students from college campus . You yourself to struggle . In most of dental college is as such provision of placement . Aur if by an chance they themselves keep you in their own college pay is too less to be taken.
content.Infrastructure: Infra is good , well managed , latest in their region but not best ,if you check all dental college near by its condition is well maintained but again not the best but better option in comparision to others that what I would like to say . Proper dental chairs ,xrays ,labs etcc

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good and make students good for practical work.

content.Placements: All students did well in their internship, and it makes them quite well in clinical works. Placements totally depend on our own interest. Our college helps us to manage with theory as well as practical part. Some students are also given placement in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Lecture theatres are fully air-conditioned, and the library has quite good books. Practical labs are well-furnished. Hostels are provided with Wi-Fi, and basketball and badminton courts are well-managed. Every year our college organises annual function and sports meet.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The placements are not a matter of concern in this course, the expertise in work is more important.

content.Placements: Can't say much about placements. The placements are not a matter of concern in this course, the expertise in work is more important.
content.Infrastructure: It has AC classrooms, a library with Wi-Fi. Labs are in fair condition. Canteen is a little bit expensive but overall good. Food is just normal. There is a basketball court in a very bad condition and just one volleyball net. It hot summer days it is very difficult to work in departments.
content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful. They teach using slides. Some teachers just play slides when in a hurry. Others teach with patience. But in the end, it is really haphazard. It's a college so, you are not spoon fed like school. The course is curriculum relevant. It's a dental college with average-sized OPD. The no. of patients are relatively less. Sometimes you have to find your own patients for your assignment.

admission_overview.title: Sri Sukhmani Dental College Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sri Sukhmani Dental College admissions are mainly entrance-based. The college offers a full-time Bachelor of Dental Surgery- BDS course at the UG level. The college reserves 50% seats under the management quota and the remaining 50% are offered through government quota. Students need to meet the admission requirements to get a seat at the college. Sri Sukhmani Dental College also known as SSDCH & Sri Sukhmani Dental College & Hospital, Mohali accepts applications online mainly. The college offers courses in affiliation with Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS). In the following sections, know all about the eligibility and admission process for Sri Sukhmani Dental College, Mohali.

eligibility_selection.title: Sri Sukhmani Dental College Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Sri Sukhmani Dental College course admissions are offered to eligible students who meet the preset admission criteria. The BDS course of the college is offered in full-time mode for a duration of five years. Students have to meet both the basic eligibility and clear the selection rounds to get a seat at the college. Students must also meet the age criteria. Applicants also have to be medically fit to be eligible. faqs.question: Which courses are available at SCPM Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital for students?

reviews_list.review_title: I'm dissatisfied with my college.

review_content.Placements: The lowest mark-qualified student can take the admission. This college takes the lowest cutoff marks students. The patient load of the Ayurvedic hospital is very low (2 to 3 in 2 days), which is very bad. The director and the administration never listen to you.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good; it is one of the best infrastructures for a B.A.M.S. college. The hostel is so bad; 3 students live in a single room, which is very congested. The hostel mess is so bad; we always find insects in the daal. Even when we complain to the management, they ignore the complaint.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure with quality education.

review_content.Placements: I belong to the medical background pursuit B.A.M.S. After completing the course, there are many futuristic options, like companies in Himalaya, Dabur, Patanjali, etc., where they opt for Ayurveda students. Further, we can open our own hospital and may choose an AMO government post.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college's infrastructure is quite good and well ventilated. We have different departments with the best-guiding faculty members; we have an Ayurveda pharmacy; and 24*7 doctors are available. The hostel is inside the institute and has good facilities and rooms. Mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best college for B.A.M.S.

review_content.Placements: As there is no placement for B.A.M.S. students but they provide internship in their hospital for 6 months but placement of other department students take place. In B.A.M.S. internship is mandatory therefore 6 months internship is done in their hospital both modern and ayurveda.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good All the classes are with digital smart board library is also good almost all the important books of the course are present in library. Both modern and ayurveda books are present in library Quality of mess is average Annual sports occur in winter time.

college_info.intro:
Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology provides both undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The courses provided by the institute include BTech, BSc, and MSc. Below are the
Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    Sri Ramachandra Engineering and Technology, Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research has been rated 4 on placements.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Sri Ramachandra Engineering and Technology, Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest report, the the highest package offered during Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology placements in 2025 stood at INR 12 LPA. The same is tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2025)the highest packageINR 12 LPA
faqs.question: What is the highest package of Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology placements?

faqs.answer: A:    In 2023, many companies participated in Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology placements. Well-known and big companies like TCS, Zoho and Danfoss were there as well as some newer companies. In 2023 students receive a range of job offers. They give the package of INR 6.5 lacs per annum to INR 15 lacs per annum.
faqs.question: How many companies participated in Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology placements 2023?

faqs.answer: A:    Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology has good placement records, especially in the recent past. An active participation of placement cell with the top companies finally leads to a wide placement percentage and also a high salary package.  Here are some broad features of placements at SRET:The college has an excellent placement record with a high percentage of students getting placed in reputed companies.SRET attracts the cream of the recruiter from all industries like IT,
faqs.question: Is Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    SRET Chennai BSc tuition fee ranges between INR 2.25 Lacs - INR 3 lakh. The fee is valid for all three BSc specialisations and BSc (Hons) course. However, this fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the SRET Chennai BSc fee.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at SRET Chennai?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, for admission to a four-year BTech course at SRET Chennai, the institute accepts a valid score of SRETEE, which is conducted  at Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research. This is an in-house entrance exam of Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology. Candidates who are interested for admission to SRET Chennai are required to qualify this exam with a valid score. Candidates who obtained minimum 60% aggregate in Class 12 are eligible to apply for this course.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BTech at SRET Chennai?

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for admissions at Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology for BTech course is that candidate should have passed Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate.  Moreover, the entrance exam accepted for BTech course admissions is TNEA.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admissions at Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology for BTech course?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Information about Sri Ramachandra life.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers 100% placements to eligible students. The average package offered is between 4 LPA and 10 LPA. The college has a dedicated placement team. The college organizes on-campus events to help students find jobs and internships. The college has a strong placement network.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has one of the largest medical libraries in the region, and collaborates with Harvard Medical International. It has a large collection of textbooks, journals, and more. We also have modern laboratories. It also exercises physiology labs with metabolic analyzers, treadmills, and more. There is a sports biomechanics lab with 3D cameras, forceplates, and more. We have a podiatry lab with foot pressure analysis systems. There is an anthropometry lab with stadiometers and more.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities with experienced faculty.

review_content.Placements: Our college is giving 100% placement offers for eligible students. The average package offered in our college is between 4 LPA and 10 LPA. Recently, a final year student got an internship offer from Amazon with a 1,10,000/- stipend. Roles offered in this course are AML analyst, ML engineer, KYC analyst, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have individual labs for each course with PCs and Wi-Fi facilities. We have a subject-concentrated library in our block with PCs and facilities. We also have individual classes for each batch of students with different courses. We have vast hostel blocks where thousands of students stay in individual hostels for boys and girls. We have 4 major canteens in our college, where we can get good food with many varieties, and we have a mess too for boys and girls. Ramachandra has vast infrastructure for sports and games, for example, our college has courts for basketball, volleyball, football, tennis, soccer, and a cricket ground.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good coaching and clean college.

content.Placements: Around 80%-90% of students from our course were placed through campus recruitment drives. Highest package is 20 LPA. Lowest package is 5 LPA. Around 70%-75% of students secure an internship through campus drives. Top roles offered are software development engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel has clean and well-maintained rooms, a common study hall, and a 24/7 water and electricity supply. Mess provides balanced diet food with vegetarian and non-vegetarian options. Facilities for both indoor and outdoor sports. Medical, 24/7 ambulance service.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure with supportive faculty and good placements.

content.Placements: I am part of the 2024 to 2028 batch. My seniors who passed away from this college received many packages mentioned below. Placement Percentage around 80 to 90% of students are placed from our course. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest package is 6 LPA, and the average package is 8 LPA. Some of the top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Accenture, HCL, and a few product based companies. Internship Opportunities Nearly 70 to 80% of students got internships, often in companies like TCS, Infosys, Startups, and local IT firms, which provided good exposure. The major roles offered are Software Developer, Analyst, Associate Engineer, System Engineer, Data Analyst, and Support Engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Information about Sri Ramachandra life.

content.Placements: Our college offers 100% placements to eligible students. The average package offered is between 4 LPA and 10 LPA. The college has a dedicated placement team. The college organizes on-campus events to help students find jobs and internships. The college has a strong placement network.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has one of the largest medical libraries in the region, and collaborates with Harvard Medical International. It has a large collection of textbooks, journals, and more. We also have modern laboratories. It also exercises physiology labs with metabolic analyzers, treadmills, and more. There is a sports biomechanics lab with 3D cameras, forceplates, and more. We have a podiatry lab with foot pressure analysis systems. There is an anthropometry lab with stadiometers and more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities with experienced faculty.

content.Placements: Our college is giving 100% placement offers for eligible students. The average package offered in our college is between 4 LPA and 10 LPA. Recently, a final year student got an internship offer from Amazon with a 1,10,000/- stipend. Roles offered in this course are AML analyst, ML engineer, KYC analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have individual labs for each course with PCs and Wi-Fi facilities. We have a subject-concentrated library in our block with PCs and facilities. We also have individual classes for each batch of students with different courses. We have vast hostel blocks where thousands of students stay in individual hostels for boys and girls. We have 4 major canteens in our college, where we can get good food with many varieties, and we have a mess too for boys and girls. Ramachandra has vast infrastructure for sports and games, for example, our college has courts for basketball, volleyball, football, tennis, soccer, and a cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. Computer Science and Medical Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Analytics) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research.

content.Placements: We have enormous placement opportunities in core jobs, non-core jobs, and the banking sector. They also support our ideas in startups and entrepreneurship. We had a 100% placement rate for the previous academic year, 2023. We have plenty of opportunities through on-campus drives.
content.Infrastructure: Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research is a large institute that supports various courses across different streams. It has a hygienic campus that meets all our needs. The environment is eco-friendly, and all our laboratories are well-maintained with all the necessary equipment.

paragraphs: Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology (SRET) concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. The participating recruiters presented various new-age job opportunities to the Class of 2025. The highest and average packages offered during SRET Chennai placements 2025 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 5.1 LPA, respectively. A total of 52 companies visited the campus in 2025 and provided job offers in various domains . Students received 21% super dream and dream offers and 79% regular offers during the placement drive 2025. Some of the top recruiters of Sri Ramachandra Faculty of Engineering and Technology include Accenture, TCS, Zoho, Virtusa, Agilisium, Avasoft, Lightcast, DeltaX, Homefirst, Indegene, E2E Networks, etc.

review_content.Placements: Actually, we are becoming doctors, so after getting a degree, we can work in private hospitals & clinics for a minimum 20k per month, & we can pursue PG in the MBBS after giving the NEET PG entrance examination. reviews.review_heading: It is a great campus with generous professors and every amenity.
reviews.review_text: Our library is Asia's the largest and the most resourceful place for studying and learning with divided sections and every book possible that one needs with a computer room and an auditorium for discussions. The cafeteria in the library is also a necessity.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is quite good, and the faculty members are good.

Our college has attached hospital.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for studies.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Dental College and Hospital, Vijayawada.

review_content.Placements: I got admission in Government Dental College and Hospital, Vijayawada, in 2012. I got 87% of merit marks in science subjects PCB in 12th standard in open category. I got the 3rd highest merit marks in class. I completed my final year in 2016 in the first attempt and completed a one-year rotatory internship in November 2017. Then, I open my own clinic in Chittor. I earn 25,000-30,000 per month easily, but after one or two years, my earnings will be 3 times, i.e., 90,000 per month. Most of my classmates started their clinics after 1 year. They also earn 50,000-60,000 per month. Some of my colleagues are not interested in opening the clinic, so they gave other government exams and got government jobs as dentists in hospitals. The salary offered is very good, and they earn 70,000-80,000 monthly.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Dental College and Hospital, Vijayawada.

content.Placements: I got admission in Government Dental College and Hospital, Vijayawada, in 2012. I got 87% of merit marks in science subjects PCB in 12th standard in open category. I got the 3rd highest merit marks in class. I completed my final year in 2016 in the first attempt and completed a one-year rotatory internship in November 2017. Then, I open my own clinic in Chittor. I earn 25,000-30,000 per month easily, but after one or two years, my earnings will be 3 times, i.e., 90,000 per month. Most of my classmates started their clinics after 1 year. They also earn 50,000-60,000 per month. Some of my colleagues are not interested in opening the clinic, so they gave other government exams and got government jobs as dentists in hospitals. The salary offered is very good, and they earn 70,000-80,000 monthly.

college_info.college_name: College of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Puri: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for College of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Puri admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college having beautiful facilities, infrastructure, and placement.

review_content.Placements: It's a good college with good teachers, having good placements giving a package of 1 to 2 Lacs per year minimum to 24 Lacs per year and more. College staff are friendly, seniors are helpful in nature, and it's the best opportunity for a student to build their career in pharmacy. There are about 105 seats available in B Pharmacy in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The condition of the college's classrooms is good, having a clean and healthy environment. The lab of our college is good, having all the instruments needed to prepare drug medicine. A strong Wi-Fi connection is available in the college. There is a library in our college that supplies all the books needed by the students. The food in the hostel canteen is average. The college is good at sports and facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: You don't choose this college; please choose a better college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very poor. This year, only Aravinda Pharmaceuticals visited our college. We have to depend on other college placement programs. This year, only 15-20 students got jobs. The median salary offered was 2.3 Lacs per annum. No internship program is provided by the college. Most students are placed in production units in different pharma sectors.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. Classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated. Labs are good. The library is good, and all types of pharmacy books are available. There are two hostels: one boys' hostel outside the campus and a girls' hostel inside the campus. There is only a volleyball court present on the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Don't choose this college because they don't do experiments seriously.

review_content.Placements: Recently, India's two big pharmaceutical companies visited my college to provide placements to the students: Sun Pharma from Sikkim and Medopharm from Chennai. After the 7th semester, students are eligible for campus selection. The highest package offered was 2.7 lacs per annum and the lowest package offered was 1.8 lacs per annum. This year, 10–15 students got jobs from the placement program.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is located near the college. The hostel rooms are very clean and spacious, and each room has two wall fans. There are a total of 250 seats. And in every room, 4 students are freely staying. There are four beds and four study tables. Many extracurricular activities are available in college. An annual festival is also organized by the college every year and many pharmacy days and AIDS days are organized. The college has good library facilities and a good accommodation room. Also, a sports championship is organized every year. Student social platform are cps blogs, which teach boys. The library is good; you can issue books from the library. Classrooms are not specific. Labs are good but teachers don't give much attention to practicals.

individual_reviews.title: Best pharmacy college to join without second thought.

content.Placements: Currently, I'm pursuing my B. Pharma at the College of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Puri. It's an amazing experience to study here. reviews.review_heading: Best pharmacy college to join without second thought.
reviews.review_text: As our college was established in 1986, its infrastructure reflects 90s aesthetics. Different branches have different buildings. Overall, the infrastructure review is (A) with 4 stars, and the hostel is the best, with proper ventilation and good modernized rooms. It gets 10 out of 10 in terms of safety.

reviews.review_heading: Don't choose this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. There are two hostels, one boys hostel outside the campus and a girls hostel on the campus. There is only a volleyball court present on the campus. The campus is too small. Labs are spacious and have all chemicals and apparatus used in industry.

reviews.review_heading: Good college having beautiful facilities, infrastructure, and placement.
reviews.review_text: The condition of the college's classrooms is good, having a clean and healthy environment. The lab of our college is good, having all the instruments needed to prepare drug medicine. A strong Wi-Fi connection is available in the college. There is a library in our college that supplies all the books needed by the students. The food in the hostel canteen is average. The college is good at sports and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: You don't choose this college; please choose a better college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. Classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated. Labs are good. The library is good, and all types of pharmacy books are available. There are two hostels: one boys' hostel outside the campus and a girls' hostel inside the campus. There is only a volleyball court present on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Don't choose this college because they don't do experiments seriously.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is located near the college. The hostel rooms are very clean and spacious, and each room has two wall fans. There are a total of 250 seats. And in every room, 4 students are freely staying. There are four beds and four study tables. Many extracurricular activities are available in college. An annual festival is also organized by the college every year and many pharmacy days and AIDS days are organized. The college has good library facilities and a good accommodation room. Also, a spor...

reviews.review_heading: Yes, it's really a very nice college for students those who wants to pursue Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: All types of facilities are available. Wi-Fi is available all over the college and hostel. Classrooms are neat and clean. All subjects' labs are available with all types of equipment and machinery, with full guidance from teachers. Every year, the college conducts sports and games like inter-batch cricket competitions, running races, long jumps, shot put, etc. The quality of food in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi is available in the college but doesn’t work properly. The labs are in good condition. The classrooms are so hi-tech and good to study. In hostel, the bathrooms are not good. Water leakage issue exists. The rooms of our hostel are not so big.

reviews.review_heading: Compared to the other colleges, it is a good college in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good in this course and department. Wi-Fi is available in this college. The class rooms are good and kept clean. The library is good but is not open all the time. The facilities in the hostel are average and the food quality is average, but they give food on time. The canteen is okay.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is compatible with Wi-Fi on all floors. The laboratories of our college are full of all required machines, and they work properly. The classrooms are acceptable. There are only three fans present for 60 students. In summer, there are some cons for us. The food of our hostel is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is now well developed. Before a few years, it was not well developed. The labs in our college are full of instruments and those instruments not only work properly but also help us know what we actually need. Our hostel is compatible with free Wi-Fi and a good warden. There are several games played at our college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good in comparison to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The library is acceptable. The Wi-Fi is fully developed in our college. The classrooms are good. The labs are full of learning instruments and the faculty members are very helpful and co operative. The food given in our hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college overall.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-developed Wi-Fi. The labs are filled with all the instruments, along with well-known lab assistants who help us to understand all about the instruments. The library is full of books that help us study easily. Our classrooms are good. In our hostel, there is compatibility with free Wi-Fi. On all floors, Wi-Fi is available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good college in Odisha. The faculties are very good.
reviews.review_text: There are sufficient classrooms and practical rooms in our college. The exam hall is so large that it is required for an examination. The college hostel has a capacity of 100 boys and about 100 girls. The quality of the food that is given in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides better placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Our campus is well-designed with modern technology as per students' requirements. Classrooms are air-conditioned. LCD projectors are available in our classrooms. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The library is well-furnished. Several books, reference books, and entrance books are available in the library. Laboratories are well-equipped with experienced professional instructors. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls. The hostel is within walking distance from ...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: It has a big campus with various facilities. Smart classrooms and well-fascinated labs with robust Wi-Fi. There is a neat and clean hostel beside the college for students. Canteen is well-maintained in the hostel and serves healthy food.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa:

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates preparing for the NEET exam to seek admission into Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kapada must possess minimum 50 percentiles in class 12 to be eligible for the NEET exam. So,  70 percentiles are more than enough to get into the college via NEET exam. Candidates can further check out more about the NEET UG eligibility criteria:Below are the NEET 2024 eligibility criteria with respect to the educational background or marks obtained in the qualifying exam.Candidates must have passed Physics,  Chemistry,  Biology/Biotechnology and English subjects individually in the qualifying examination.Candidates must have studied this subject as core or additional subjects.Candidates belonging to the General category must have scored a minimum of 50 per cent in the qualifying examination.Candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste/ Scheduled Tribes/ Other Backward should have a minimum score of 40 per cent in the qualifying examination.Candidates, who belong to the General category and are applying under the Persons with Disability (PWD) Quota, must have a minimum score of 45 per cent marks in the qualifying examination.

faqs.answer: A:    Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa is a well-known institution for MD, MS, B.Sc, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Dermatology, General Medicine, Physiology, Anatomy, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery, Pediatrics, Biochemistry, Forensic Medical Science, Community Medicine, Radiotherapy, Microbiology, Pathology, Psychiatry, Pulmonary Medicine.

review_content.Placements: Our college is a government medical college, and all students participate in placements. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The fourth year is for internship, and many students find their internships in other hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good in our college compared to other colleges. The hostel food is good as per instructions. Sports are less preferred, but we have a good canteen in our college where many food items are available.

reviews_list.review_title: Excellent college because of good faculty and really good value for money.

review_content.Placements: 175 MBBS seats are available, faculty are good, hostel facilities and library facilities are available, infrastructure is average, and the environment is friendly with friendly faculty and good support from seniors. Nearly INR 25k is offered for an internship for 1 year after 4 years of college fees. The average hostel fee is INR 20k, and INR 20k goes into the mess fees.

Every department has separate lecture galleries, AC is available in labs only, hostels including mess, no canteens, mess has a small ground, food quality in mess is average, and drinking water facilities are available in both hostels and colleges.

overview_faqs.question: Is Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa is a renowned institution offering MD, MS, B.Sc, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa boasts an impressive review rating of 3.88 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.4 for Campus Life, 4.2 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 3.2 for Infrastructure.

description: Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 21972 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa MBBS cutoff 2025 was 21972 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 22499 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 15121 to 170753. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kadapa MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MS in Obstetrtics and Gynaecology, followed by MS in ENT (Otorhinolaryngology). The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 15121 and 27335, respectively.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kapada offers a variety of MD and MS courses via the Andhra Pradesh NEET PG exam. Considering the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kapada cutoff 2022, the last-round cutoff ranged between 68795 and 125674 for the General AI category candidates. Wherein, MD in Physiology stood as the toughest course to get into Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kapada. Similarly, the easiest course was MD in Pharmacology for the General AI category

The Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Kapada released its round-wise cutoff 2023 for candidates seeking admission to various MBBS course. For the General AI category candidates, the MBBS course cutoff stood at 31214. Similarly, the 2022 and 2021 cutoff stood at 34191 and 28194, respectively. reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not that good. The building is very old, and it looks more like a government office. There are no air-conditioners in the classrooms, and classrooms do not have good ventilation. The only projector doesn't work properly, and the speakers in the classrooms don't work very well. The infrastructure of the hostel is the worst. They never clean the hostel room. The mess food is usually not good. There won't be any event for sports or games like in other colleges. ...

reviews.review_heading: It is extraordinary college.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms maintained neatly. They have a seating capacity of 200 people. Hostel facilities are good but they should increase the facilities. Canteen is also present in the college. Cricket ground is also present near the hostel. All courts such as badminton, volleyball, basketball are also present.

reviews.review_heading:
Very good college as it is a government college 
.
reviews.review_text:
Good infrastructure do not expect much as it is a government college hostel facility is too decent not so good but sustainable food is also better as it is student organised mess A big ground is available to play cricket and other sports cricket teams are there
.
