college_info.intro:
Candidates willing to get admission to various courses must apply online on the official website of UNIRAJ University of Rajasthan. At the UG level, the Rajasthan University offers BTech, BCA, BBA, and various other courses for students. At the PG level, the University provides MSc, MBA, and various other courses to students.
The popular programmes provided by the Uniraj Jaipur are MBA and BTech, as the University provides good placement opportunities with students able to choose between many specialisations depending upon career prospects or personal interests with a comprehensive course curriculum that covers not only academically relavant but gives students a holistic understanding and practical skills for their future careers.
Moreover, the UNIRAJ BTech is special as it is an integrated 5-year programme offered through its Center for Converging Technologies (CCT) and combines BTech and MTech with 4 streams of specialisation available to students including:

The various RU Jaipur courses include BCom, BA, BSc, BCA, BBA, LLB, BVA, BPEd, BPA, etc. at the UG level. While PG courses include MBA, MA, MSc, MCom, MEd, LLM, MTech and various other courses in full-time mode.

Admission to any of the following courses is granted on the basis of merit and an entrance exam. The Uni of Rajasthan fee structure ranges from INR 1,465 to INR 4.84 Lakh, depending on the level of the course chosen. Students must also complete the course eligibility as highlighted here:

faqs.answer: A:    No, admission to BA LLB at UNIRAJ is made based on entrance exam scores. The university conducts the RULET (Rajasthan University Law Entrance Test) exam for BA LLB admissions. It is held in offline mode across various test centres in Jaipur only. The entrance test is for 300 marks and has MCQ-type questions from the English language, Legal Reasoning, Current Affairs and General Knowledge, and Quantitative Aptitude and Logical Reasoning.

faqs.answer: A:    The course fees of the Bachelor of Technology at Rajasthan University range from INR 3.4 Lacs to INR 4.4 Lacs (for 4 to 5 years). The students must qualify for the entrance exam to apply for admission to the Bachelor of Technology at Rajasthan University. The Bachelor of Technology course is offered for a duration of four to five years. Whereas the Rajasthan University Postgraduation admission is done basis of the Admission Monitoring System wherein the selection is made on the basis of qualifying examination (Bachelor's degree) marks with 55 percent or Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering GATE exam.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and highly qualified professors.

review_content.Placements: Basically, we have around 60 students in each class. I’m in the literature field, and we have great alumni from our field. They are now working in architecture companies, and many have become authors. They earn around 10 to 20 LPA. Our course generally focuses on the philosophy of great authors like Shakespeare and Tagore. I learn a lot from their learnings.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food here is great and edible. Mostly hostels don’t provide good food and facilities, but my hostel provides very nice food, and the facilities are also excellent. We have Wi-Fi to study, so there is no need for mobile data. Classrooms are somehow clean. My college also focuses on sports and the development of children.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely the best college in Rajasthan because of placement, facilities, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements are excellent. About 35% students in every batch are selected into their further branch for upcoming studies. There are no packages in medical studies. Here, we considered a seat in postgraduate colleges as placement. Overall, this college is best for upcoming studies and placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college was opened in 1992, and since its opening, every batch has done well in studies in their era due to the college's best infrastructure for the MBBS course. There are different labs in every department. Labs are in good condition. There is a central library, where students come and study quietly.

faqs.answer: University of Rajasthan is a public/ government university located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. It is one of the oldest universities in the state. It was set up in 1947 as the University of Rajasthan in 1956. Spread in approximately 705.0 acres on Jawaharlal Nehru Marg, also known as the central spine of Jaipur, the university has always accorded a high priority to games and sports. Uniraj has a modern sports complex, well-stocked library and well-equipped medical facilities to students. It is one of the renowned universities in India.
faqs.question: Q: What is the history of Rajasthan University? Does it have a good reputation?

overview_faqs.question: What is the history of Rajasthan University? Does it have a good reputation?
overview_faqs.answer: University of Rajasthan is a public/ government university located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. It is one of the oldest universities in the state. It was set up in 1947 as the University of Rajasthan in 1956. Spread in approximately 705.0 acres on Jawaharlal Nehru Marg, also known as the central spine of Jaipur, the university has always accorded a high priority to games and sports. Uniraj has a modern sports complex, well-stocked library and well-equipped medical facilities to students. It is one of the renowned universities in India.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech courses at Rajasthan University?
overview_faqs.answer: The course fees of the Bachelor of Technology at Rajasthan University range from INR 3.4 Lacs to INR 4.4 Lacs (for 4 to 5 years). The students must qualify for the entrance exam to apply for admission to the Bachelor of Technology at Rajasthan University. The Bachelor of Technology course is offered for a duration of four to five years. Whereas the Rajasthan University Postgraduation admission is done basis of the Admission Monitoring System wherein the selection is made on the basis of qualifying examination (Bachelor's degree) marks with 55 percent or Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering GATE exam.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for the BA.LLB. (Hons) programme at Rajasthan University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the BA.LLB. (Hons) programme at Rajasthan University is INR 2.3 lakh. This is the total tuition fee for the five year BA LLB (Hons) programme and does not contain the hostel fee or the mess fee. The fee mentioned here is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: UNIRAJ Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, the teachers are helpful, classroom is nice.

content.Placements: 90% student workplace in our college. The highest package is 8 LPA, the average packages 3 LPA. Top recruiters who come to our campus are Wipro, Amazon, Flipkart, and IBM. 70 to 80% of students got internships in our course in high companies. The top role is web development, software engineer, data analysis, and business development.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are very Wi-Fi is available for every and each student. 3 labs are available in our college, and the library is very good, with all the books available in the library. The hostel quality is very well and the food is available in a mess, and the canteen is very tasty. The medical and sports game facilities are also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Only 30% of students are placed in my college. The lowest is Rs.10,000 per month, and the highest is Rs. 40,000 per month. The Teleperformance company is the top recruiting company that previously come in my college. No one got an internship from our course. Only sales roles get offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very poor. There are no facilities in my course or department. Wi-Fi is only available for teachers. There is no Wi-Fi available for students. There is no hostel facility in our college. About the quality of food, I don't know, because I'm not in a hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and highly qualified professors.

content.Placements: Basically, we have around 60 students in each class. I’m in the literature field, and we have great alumni from our field. They are now working in architecture companies, and many have become authors. They earn around 10 to 20 LPA. Our course generally focuses on the philosophy of great authors like Shakespeare and Tagore. I learn a lot from their learnings.
content.Infrastructure: The food here is great and edible. Mostly hostels don’t provide good food and facilities, but my hostel provides very nice food, and the facilities are also excellent. We have Wi-Fi to study, so there is no need for mobile data. Classrooms are somehow clean. My college also focuses on sports and the development of children.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best college in Rajasthan because of placement, facilities, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent. About 35% students in every batch are selected into their further branch for upcoming studies. There are no packages in medical studies. Here, we considered a seat in postgraduate colleges as placement. Overall, this college is best for upcoming studies and placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was opened in 1992, and since its opening, every batch has done well in studies in their era due to the college's best infrastructure for the MBBS course. There are different labs in every department. Labs are in good condition. There is a central library, where students come and study quietly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a very good college in this area.

content.Placements: There was no placement for B.Sc. students. You have to do it yourself. Placements were open only for commerce and engineering students. Majorly, Tisco came for an interview and placement. Top roles were something 35 LPA, but only for top qualified students. Average students get only a 10-15 thousand per month package.
content.Infrastructure: A great campus, garden, lawn, playground, everything was included. 2 movie songs were shot in my time. You will get a 100-student seating capacity library with Wi-Fi + digital library and student corners also. All labs were well furnished. The classroom was also in good condition. Proper seating, well-lit, fans, but not air-conditioned.

courses_data.description: MBA is a 2 years course at UNIRAJ. A Bachelor degree with at least 50% aggregate in any discipline are required are to apply for this course. The admission is based on thePIM-MAT or URATPG entrance exam.The individuals who do not score 50 per cent and above are not qualified and ought to consider other alternatives, such as online or part-time MBA.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission for an MBA in Rajasthan University?
faqs.answer: Candidates seekingMBA admission at Rajasthan Universitymust meet the eligibility criteria prescribed by the university. The university's MBA eligibility criteria require an applicant to have scored at least 50% in bachelor's degree in any discipline. Hence, a candidate scoring less than 50% is not eligible to apply forMBA at UniRaj. They can look for other B-schools where they are eligible to pursue MBA. Alternatively, they can check out colleges offeringonline MBA courses. For candidates who wi

faqs.question: Can I do MBA from Rajasthan University?
faqs.answer: ThroughRAPIM, a part of Rajasthan University, UNIRAJ providesMBAprogrammes.  A total of 120 students are enrolled per year and the admission is based on performance on either the PIM-MAT or URATPG entrance exams, with the exception of the PhD track. A bachelor's degree with a minimum cumulative GPA of 45% is required for the Human Resource Management course offered by UNIRAJ, which also provides specialised MBA programmes. Overall, UNIRAJ offers MBA programmes with different, well specified sele

faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam for admission to the MBA programme at UNIRAJ?
faqs.answer: For entry into UNIRAJ's MBA programme, there is an entrance exam. To be eligible for admission, students must successfully complete either the Podar Institute Of Management-Management Aptitude Test (PIM-MAT) or the University's URATPG entrance exam. Except for the PhD track, this entrance test is a crucial part of the UNIRAJ MBA programme's admissions procedure.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get a seat in UNIRAJ?
faqs.answer: Rajasthan University released the 2025 merit list for its affiliated colleges for admission to various UG & PG courses. For the General AI category students, the cutoff percentage was61.6and90.4for admission toB.Sc in BotanyatUniversity Maharaja College, University of RajasthanandUniversity Maharani College, University of Rajasthan, resepectively. So, candidates seeking admission must target higher cutoff percentage to get a seat at UNIRAJ.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at Rajasthan University (UNIRAJ)?
faqs.answer: In order to take BTech Course at Rajasthan University (UNIRAJ), one should have passed Class 12 with 55% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics.They should also score a JEE Main score to stand a chance of admission.The university adopts the merit-based counselling procedure.The recruits should apply online and provide the necessary documents.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is required for BTech at Rajasthan University (UNIRAJ)?
faqs.answer: Admission to BTech courses at Rajasthan University (UNIRAJ) is based on the score in JEE Main.Selection is done on the basis of the performance in the JEE and Class 12 marks.The centralized counselling is used to allocate seats.Students should make sure that they fulfill the academic as well as the exam cut-off requirements.

faqs.answer: The date for the release of the URATPG 2025 LLM merit list has not been announced yet. placement_data.title: UNIRAJ Placements Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement details are yet to be released for the batch passed out in 2025. The University has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for batch 2024. According to the report, 15 UG 3 year students were placed out of the total 5632 graduated students during University of Rajasthan placements 2024 with a median package of INR 5 LPA . In UG 5 year program, 32 students of the batch 2024 got placements with a median salary of INR 8 LPA.

In PG 1 year program , 18 students of batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 4 LPA. Further, 288 students from the PG 2 year batch 2024 secured placements with the median salary of INR 5 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of University of Rajasthan in the recent past include Google Amazon, Wipro, Infosys, TCS, etc.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing LLM from UNIRAJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, students with a LLM degree from UNIRAJ can pursue various job opportunities in the government sector. Interested students can take several entrance exams conducted by government organisations, such as PSUs, UPSCs, Public Banks, etc. Tabulated below are some of the prospective government jobs along with their average salaries: Job Profiles Average Salary Public Prosecutor INR 5 to INR 8 lakh Law Officer INR 4 to INR 6 lakh Legal Advisor INR 4 to INR 7 lakh Assistant Public Prosecutor INR 3 to INR 5 lakh Note: The above salaries are collated from multiple sources and are likely to vary.

faqs.question: What is the median package offered during UNIRAJ placements?
faqs.answer: According to the UNIRAJ NIRF report for 2025, the course-wise median package offered during the UNIRAJ placements of 2024 is presented in the placements table as given below: Course Median Package (2024) UG 3-year median package INR 5 LPA UG 5-year median package INR 8 LPA PG 1-year median package INR 4 Lakh PG 2-year total students INR 5 Lakh PG 5-year students placed INR 4.2 Lakh This figure is according to NIRF Data that the institute gave to NIRF and is accurate for the year.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MEd programme at University of Rajasthan?
faqs.answer: Candidates who are offered admission to the UNIRAJ MEd programme must pay the first installment of tuition fees. The tuition fee to be paid for a two-year duration ranges from INR 4,800 to INR 58,000 .

faqs.question: What is the fee for the BA.LLB. (Hons) programme at Rajasthan University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the BA.LLB. (Hons) programme at Rajasthan University is INR 2.3 lakh. This is the total tuition fee for the five year BA LLB (Hons) programme and does not contain the hostel fee or the mess fee. The fee mentioned here is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee for four years BSc in UNIRAJ?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees to be paid for BSc in UNIRAJ range from INR 6,600 to INR 2.8 lakh . Apart from tuition fees, the fee structure includes other charges such as admission fees, hostel fees, development & training fees, etc. Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

description: UNIRAJ cutoff 2025 has been released for the MD course based on the NEET PG entrance exam scores, followed by the counselling procedure. Aspirants preparing for admission can check out the exam-wise sections below to view the course and category-wise Rajasthan University cutoffs.

Rajasthan University accepts the NEET PG entrance exam for selecting students to the MD and other courses. UNIRAJ NEET PG cutoff 2025 was 53378 for MD in Community Medicine at Jhalawar Medical College, Jhalawar. This cutoff rank is valid for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same college and specialisation was 61601, while in 2023, it was 66949. To view the cutoff details for Round 2 over three years, refer to the table below:

The University of Rajasthan accepts NEET PG entrance exam scores, followed by the NEET PG Counselling process for admission to the MD course. UNIRAJ offers admission to various MD and MS courses through various affiliated medical colleges.

In 2025, the NEET PG cutoff rank for admission to the MD in General Medicine course was 2733 in the General category for Talking about the OBC category students, the Round 2 cutoff rank for the same course was Candida
Candidates who appeared in the NEET PG entrance exam, followed by the NEET PG counselling, can check out the table below to view or download the round and year-wise consolidated cutoff PDF lists.

UNIRAJ admission to super speciality courses, including various specialisations of DM and MCh, is based on NEET SS entrance scores followed by NEET SScounselling. During the UNIRAJ NEET SS cutoff 2024, the last round closing ranks ranged between 259 and 3180 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Of all the courses, the most challenging for admission was M.Ch. in Urology, considering its lowest rank. To view the cutoff details for other courses and specialisations, refer to the tab

For the General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses were M.Ch. in Urology, followed by M.Ch. in Surgical Oncology, and M.Ch. in Urology, with NEET SS last round closing ranks of 259, 304 and 3095, respectively. Refer to the table below to view the cutoff details for other categories and rounds.

NEET SS counselling 2025 will be released soon after the announcement of the result. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated round and year-wise cutoff PDFs.

Given below is the Rajasthan University NEET PG cutoff rank for the General All India category students. The available cutoff is for the Jhalawar Medical College, Jhalawar MD course, which is affiliated with the University of Rajasthan. Of all the specialisations, MD in General Medicine can be considered as the most popular course because of the most competitive cutoff rank of 144 for the General category All India Quota.

Rajasthan University released the cutoff percentage for admission to various UG and PG courses. As per the Rajasthan University merit list 2025, the cutoff percentage for admission to B.Sc in Botany was 90.4 for University Maharani College, University of Rajasthan, while for University Maharaja College, University of Rajasthan, the cutoff percentage for the same course was 61.6, for students belonging to the General AI quota. hostel.description:
The University is at present running 19 Hostels, out of which 14 are in the Main Campus and rest are situated
in the constituent colleges. Every hostel has its own unique tradition. Youth festival is organized in each hostel every year. This festival leaves a memorable imprint on hostel inmates. An inter-hostel Youth Festival is also organized so as to provide a common competitive platform for the manifestation of cultural talents of the hostel inmates

library.description: The University of Rajasthan has a central library with the seating capacity of about 700 students. With more than 5 lac books and bound periodicals, the library subscribes to about 60 current journals and popular magazines relating to various subjects. In addition, about 10500 e-Journals are available for online access under e-Shodh Sindhu Consortium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Poddar International College, JaipurReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good, the teachers are helpful, classroom is nice.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very Wi-Fi is available for every and each student. 3 labs are available in our college, and the library is very good, with all the books available in the library. The hostel quality is very well and the food is available in a mess, and the canteen is very tasty. The medical and sports game facilities are also very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Poddar International College, JaipurReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very poor. There are no facilities in my course or department. Wi-Fi is only available for teachers. There is no Wi-Fi available for students. There is no hostel facility in our college. About the quality of food, I don't know, because I'm not in a hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by University Rajasthan College, University of RajasthanReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and highly qualified professors.
reviews.review_text: The food here is great and edible. Mostly hostels don’t provide good food and facilities, but my hostel provides very nice food, and the facilities are also excellent. We have Wi-Fi to study, so there is no need for mobile data. Classrooms are somehow clean. My college also focuses on sports and the development of children.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Government Medical College, KotaReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best college in Rajasthan because of placement, facilities, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college was opened in 1992, and since its opening, every batch has done well in studies in their era due to the college's best infrastructure for the MBBS course. There are different labs in every department. Labs are in good condition. There is a central library, where students come and study quietly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Sri Balaji PG MahavidyalayaReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, a very good college in this area.
reviews.review_text: A great campus, garden, lawn, playground, everything was included. 2 movie songs were shot in my time. You will get a 100-student seating capacity library with Wi-Fi + digital library and student corners also. All labs were well furnished. The classroom was also in good condition. Proper seating, well-lit, fans, but not air-conditioned.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by S.S. Jain Subodh PG CollegeReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in the last years.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very attractive and provides a good environment for students. The classrooms are new, there are labs for every subject or course, and a good Wi-Fi connection for students, along with a modern library with full resources. A hostel is managed by the college samiti with a good environment. The college holds many sports and games at the district level. The canteen is good with pure food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by University Commerce College, University of RajasthanReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good for middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: In university commerce college, the infrastructure of this college is fair. Not too good and not much bad as. The building of this college is very big, old and strong. There are 2 large area size garden for students to play sports. And there is one canteen also.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Kanoria PG Mahila MahavidyalayaReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Teachers are the best for our department of BCA.
reviews.review_text: Our lab is perfect including all computers and systems like the light network teachers management etc. All of us but I dont know about the hostel because I dont live in a hostel. There are many computer labs in our college and we can also use their computers for study along with classes. Our department is also organising a technical fest which is very good for students, as many colleges participate in.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by S.S. Jain Subodh PG CollegeReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in Jaipur for student who wants to do their graduation and also post graduation.
reviews.review_text: The college provides excellent infrastructure and the classes were good. Labs for Physics and Chemistry were in very good condition with each and every instrument that we needed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Poddar Group of InstitutionReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Story for the best college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-maintained infrastructure with AC classrooms, well-equipped IT labs, a library, and a canteen with tasty food. Students can apply for hostel facilities. The hostel provides facilities like separate attached washrooms, a reading room, internet, and so on.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Poddar Group of InstitutionReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Overall satisfied with helpful faculty members, nice environment, decent placement, and good events.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi facilities, well-maintained computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-managed library. There are hostel facilities on another campus. There are 3 campuses, and all are good. The canteen food is also good and tasty.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ambika Institute for Paramedical StudiesReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In my college, all facilities are available like Wi-Fi, lab instruments, CCTV camera on campus and corridors, classrooms, best tables, library, facilities for sports and cultural activities for the students, etc. Our hostel has all facilities, medical, sports, games, Wi-Fi, and best environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by S.S. Jain Subodh PG CollegeReviewed on 6 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: S.S. Jain Subodh College provides really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Courses in the college are peaceful and simple for a student to understand. Our college provides the best facilities. It includes Wi-Fi, well-equipped classrooms, and a student library. The hostel has many facilities provided by the college department. The canteen serves good food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by University Maharaja College, University of RajasthanReviewed on 5 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: An honest student review of University Maharaja College, Jaipur, highlighting poor placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college does not meet the expectations of a modern higher-education institution. Classrooms are outdated. They are poorly maintained, and  overcrowded. Basic facilities like proper seating, functional fans. Along with clear boards and projectors are missing from classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St. Wilfreds P.G. College, JaipurReviewed on 5 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This college is the worst option for any student.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean, but there is only one Wi-Fi on each floor, which doesn't even work properly sometimes. In labs, PCs are too old, and we practice coding in Turbo and C++. This app was used in the 19th century, and they used to study on whiteboards, which are not visible from the blackboard.

college_info.college_name: UNIRAJ

data.description: The faculty members of UNIRAJ have established international associations with research institutes and universities from Switzerland, Germany, the USA, Italy, France, Australia, Norway, Canada, etc for undertaking collaborative and exchange programmes. UNIRAJ faculty is experienced and the university invites faculty for guest lectures.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about UNIRAJ - University of Rajasthan

likes.text: This is an awesome college for students in the medical and technical lines, And those who are pursuing the management field.
The college doesn't provide any placements in this course, but this course gives us complete knowledge about the subjects.

likes.text: The university offers a good sports complex, a library, a hostel, a transport facility, a canteen, etc.
Infrastructure of college is really nice and almost all facilities are available like wifi, Labs, Library with almost all needed books , Classrooms with smart projector screen.

likes.text: The curriculum is regularly updated to incorporate the most recent advancements, ensuring that students are well-prepared to excel and confidently apply their knowledge in the professional world.
In our college teachers are helpful, qualified, knowledgeable and very good in teaching.
